Give feedback

If you need a garage door opener fixed **today in or near Pleasanton** , these are the strongest same-day options I found:

### 1\. Valiant Garage Door

4.6•Garage Door Services•Open

Website•Directions•(925) 409-4974

  * Local Pleasanton company.

  * Specifically advertises same-day garage door opener diagnostics and repairs, including remotes, keypads, sensors, motors, and travel-limit issues when parts and scheduling allow.

  * Phone: (925) 409-4974. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

### 2\. East Bay Garage Door Repair

5.0•Garage Door Services•Open

Website•Directions•(925) 808-3168

  * Offers same-day mobile service in Pleasanton.

  * Specializes in opener repair, sensor alignment, Wi-Fi/smartphone setup, battery backup systems, and replacement of major opener brands.

  * Phone: (510) 694-2210. [Garage Door Opener Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Same-Day](https://eastbaygaragedoorrepair.com/opener-repair/pleasanton/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[East Bay Garage Door Repair | Same-Day Service](https://eastbaygaragedoorrepair.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

### 3\. Precision Garage Door Service

4.4•Garage Door Services•Open

Website•Directions•(408) 916-5420

  * Same-day repairs for openers, springs, and cables.

  * Open seven days a week with evening availability and fully stocked service vehicles.

  * Phone: (925) 268-9267. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

### 4\. Door King

5.0•Garage Door Services•Open

Website•Directions•(925) 387-4404

  * Pleasanton-based company with extended hours and emergency availability.

  * Handles repair and maintenance for garage door systems and openers.

  * Phone: (925) 387-4404. [Door King | Expert Garage Door Services in Pleasanton, CA](https://www.rollupdoorssales.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

### 5\. Dully Garage Door Repair Inc

1.6•Garage Door Services

Directions•(510) 828-6122

  * 24/7 availability listed.

  * Local customer reviews specifically mention same-day opener diagnosis and replacement.

  * Phone: (925) 387-7310. [Dully Garage Door Repair Inc](https://dully-garage-door.localo.site/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

### My shortlist

For an opener that suddenly stopped working, I'd call in this order:

  1. Valiant Garage Door

  2. East Bay Garage Door Repair

  3. Precision Garage Door Service

All three explicitly advertise same-day opener repair in the Pleasanton area. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Opener Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Same-Day](https://eastbaygaragedoorrepair.com/opener-repair/pleasanton/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If your opener is making noises, flashing lights, won't close, or is completely dead, tell me the brand (LiftMaster, Chamberlain, Genie, Craftsman, etc.) and symptoms, and I can help determine whether it's likely a sensor issue, opener failure, or a broken spring before you call.
